channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Innovation Lightbulb: NSF’s Key Role in Economic and National Security
item.description: The NSF's mandateto secure the national defense, while often overlooked, has never been more relevant than it is today.

item.title: AI and the Future of Mediation
item.description: As conflicts grow more complex and harder to resolve, AI offers new tools for mediation, but also new risks. This report explores how algorithmic systems can support negotiators without undermining trust, confidentiality, or human judgment.
